channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Large Tree, 29th May
item.description:
Resident called report large tree on the corner of Newton road and Faraday road which block access to the pavement and an obstruction to drivers. Please can we inspect.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newton Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 29th May
item.description:
Litter near junction elmers end road and croydon road. Please can this be looked into.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 97, Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson and Brondesbury Road, 29th May
item.description:
Flipping and sweep branches please

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Diseased Tree, 29th May
item.description:
Resident called report large tree outside her house no: 37 which she has club rooted and diseased. She's due have a tree surgeon come around to house do some work, and she would like know if ok for them to cut back the large branches. Please can we call back to advise.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marne Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground bin constantly overflowing with domestic waste, 29th May
item.description:
Residents use the playground bin as their private bin, leaving it constantly overflowing with domestic waste. This includes food waste that is then opened up by foxes. Please find and fine these inconsistent residents. This is an everyday behaviour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ambleside Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th May
item.description:
Flytipping has taken place outside Sibley Court on Beckenham Grove. Please can this be investigated and collected.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckenham Grove, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins on pavement yet again, 29th May
item.description:
Bins left on pavement for a few weeks again. This has been going on now for years.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hatherley Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime vine left on pavement, 29th May
item.description:
Boot. Headed.reach Line bike left on pavement, by entrance to alleyway from Baths Road to the Avenue. Been there 48 hrs.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Baths Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ivy grown on walk way near St Dominics school on Wick Road, 29th May
item.description:
Ivy grown on walk way near St Dominics school on Wick Road. Disabled resident unable to drive scooter over it or around it with ease. Please have this removed. Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hedgers Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bin push over, litter on the floor., 29th May
item.description:
Black bin push over, litter on the floor.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlborough Park Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 16, 29th May
item.description:
A black bin ans a cupboard. I heard noises in the early hours. I have come out of my flat to go to work and this is outside

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag (Estates)

item.title: Uneven pavement - foliage problems, 29th May
item.description:
Uneven tarmac around tree roots plus foliage debris causing problems. I fell here last month as I tripped on tarmac.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and rubbish dumped, 29th May
item.description:
West end of Fendyke road - bag of household waste and a mattress dumped.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fendyke Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 74 Brondesbury villas, 29th May
item.description:
Dog mess

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of big boards, 29th May
item.description:
Lots of big boards and a carpet in the bins area next to Barbrook house. There are also some blinds. The fly tip happened yesterday.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Full bin, 29th May
item.description:
The litter bin in Warwick Gardens is full and overflowing, please empty.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Azenby Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 29th May
item.description:
A Blue BMW with Bricks under the wheels has been parked in the road for over 6 months This has a foreign number plate parked between 3 and 5 please investigate .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chipstead Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 29th May
item.description:
On the corner of Yoakley Road and Church Street. This site invites fly tipping because rubbish collections are not frequent enough

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Church Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped outside of Herne Hill Space, 29th May
item.description:
Rubbish dumped outside of Herne Hill Space. To the right of 135 Dulwich Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131-133, Dulwich Road, Herne Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St Faith’s Road SE21 a couple of y - flytipped, 29th May
item.description:
St Faith’s Road SE21 a couple of yards from Norwood Road junction is a green plastic road sweeper’s rubbish bag bin with a number of flytipped black plastic sacks next to it – contents unknown. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your for reporting pin &, picture & Google Streetview: https://www.google.com/maps/@51.4425811,-0.1050713,3a,75y,256.19h,72.61t/data=!3m7!1e1!3m5!1s64WmwTCoA3juZbnQ-Jlo9Q!2e0!6shttps:%2F%2Fstreetviewpixels-pa.googleapis.com%2Fv1%2Fthumbnail%3Fcb_client%3Dmaps_sv.tactile%26w%3D900%26h%3D600%26pitch%3D17.390490542782842%26panoid%3D64WmwTCoA3juZbnQ-Jlo9Q%26yaw%3D256.19305923183947!7i16384!8i8192?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDUyNi4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Faith's Road, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
